sentences.translationEn: Ahmed woke up early in the morning.

sentences.translation: Obukao se i brzo pojeo doručak.
sentences.translationEn: He got dressed and quickly ate breakfast.

sentences.translation: Uzeo je torbu i izašao iz kuće.
sentences.translationEn: He took his bag and left the house.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ إِلَى المَدْرَسَةِ قَبْلَ الدَّرْسِ الأَوَّلِ.
sentences.translation: Stigao je u školu prije prvog časa.
sentences.translationEn: He arrived at school before the first class.

sentences.translation: Sjeo je na svoje mjesto i izvadio knjigu.
sentences.translationEn: He sat in his seat and took out his book.
